## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:unit` and `npm test` pass
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] New/changed component has a JSDoc `@example`, a `preview/registry.tsx` entry, and a test
- [ ] Commit(s) follow Conventional Commits (English, no AI attribution)
